title: US celebrates its 250th anniversary amid international congratulations and reflections on its legacy
summary: World leaders such as the Japanese prime minister congratulate the United States as the country commemorates its independence amid debates about its expansionist history and internal contradictions.

summary: Bitcoin and Ethereum rise while doubts circulate about the sustainability of the altcoin rally and a possible bearish cycle.

summary: The Spanish Ibex and German Dax approach all-time highs driven by investor optimism and strong corporate earnings.

summary: The rise of AI boosts demand for chips and energy, impacting production costs and generating new patterns in currency hedging flows.

summary: Global stock markets showed divergent trends as the yen weakens and investors assess macroeconomic indicators.

title: Micron reports strong earnings but maintains a minimal dividend; Michael Burry bets on a decline
summary: The chip maker earned $24.67 per share but its dividend remains only 15 cents, while investor Michael Burry reveals a short position.

title: Christine Lagarde does not rule out an early departure from the ECB presidency
summary: Speculation about the future of the European Central Bank president intensifies as key factors for a possible early exit are analyzed.

summary: Analysts are divided on the direction of crude oil prices, with Goldman seeing the moves already priced in and Citi warning of a sharp decline.

summary: Colonial enters Germany through a joint venture with Generali, while institutional investors remain cautious about the real estate loan market.

title: Shohei Ohtani has a modest outing on the mound and could be a designated hitter in the All-Star Game
summary: The Angels pitcher and batter allowed three runs and had no hits, and his manager expressed doubts about him pitching in the All-Star Game.

summary: Lionel Messi scored in his eighth consecutive World Cup match to give Argentina the pass, while Mohamed Salah converted a penalty for Egypt.

summary: Authorities warn of landslide risk as the sixth anniversary of the deadly 2020 floods in Kumamoto is commemorated.

summary: The world's largest asset manager is transforming by focusing on alternative investments, leaving behind its traditional image as a manager of exchange-traded funds.

title: Cryptocurrency experts switch to gold after collapse of precious metals market

title: Shell accused of misleading British courts in a pollution case in Nigeria
